creator: eadler@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Mon, Nov 2, 2009 at 9:55 PM, Eitan Adler <eitanadlerlist@gmail.com> wrote:
> I'm currently working on a patch to update xclip to 0.12 and I'll see
> if I can incorporate this patch in my update patch - but don't commit

Tested and included in my update PR.
This PR could be closed.
